input.content:
# Standing Intent — Freddie's forward watch

## This cycle

Workspace is at bootstrap: 21 days into tenure, kernel-only (no program), substrate minimal and coherent. All governance and persona files in place, no intake placed yet, no scheduled work.

## What I'm watching for

- **Program activation**: if the operator forks a program (alpha-trader, alpha-author, etc.), that triggers a workspace-guide rewrite and new persona/principles. I'll read the new mandate and transition.
- **Intake arrival**: if the operator (or connected platforms) land observations into operation/inbound or operation/memory, I'll apply intake-placement (derive + cite + place in meaning-home).
- **Task definition**: if the operator schedules a recurring cadence or defines a new operation, I'll author supporting substrate (task YAML, initial recurrence scaffold).
- **Connection request**: if the operator connects platforms (Slack, Notion, etc.), I'll verify the feed is live and author the watch declarations.

## Why standing down

The workspace has nothing to tend right now — no backlog, no conflicts, no stale connections. The next move is the operator's: activate a program, connect a platform, or start placing intake. I'll read the substrate shift and serve it when it lands.

## Next review trigger

Any substantive change to the substrate that falls under my stewardship principles (intake-placement, attribution-integrity, commons-coherence, connection-hygiene) will wake me. I'm ready.

---
